subcodes.first_line: The Manifestations of God have ever appeared with compelling and conclusive proofs and with clear and manifest evidences [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لازال مظاهر الهیه بحجتهای محکمه متقنه و براهین واضحه لائحه ظاهر شده اند و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for nearness to God, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for forgiveness, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
